utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification: 1) destination: provided. 2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates. 3) transportation: flight details with type, route, class, and cost—meets requirement. 4) accommodation: hotel name, duration, and cost—meets requirement. 5) activities: list with names and individual costs—meets requirement. 6) additional_services: provided as empty list—acceptable per format. 7) total_budget: includes total_cost, initial_budget, remaining_funds—complete breakdown present. Therefore, all 7/7 are fully specified.
